name: Confetti Chicken and Pepper Rice
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup yellow bell pepper, in strips 1x1/4 inch
1/2 cup red bell pepper, in strips 1x1/4 inch
1/2 cup green bell pepper, in strips 1x1/4 inch
1 1/2 cups cubed cooked chicken breast or turkey
1/4 cup thinly sliced green onions with tops
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring broth and peppers to a boil in a saucepan.
2. Stir in rice. Cover and remove from heat.
3. Let stand for 5 minutes, or until all liquid is absorbed.
4. While rice is standing, combine chicken, mustard, and honey.
5. Stir chicken mixture and green onions into rice and heat through.
